status_note: Final. Two champions documented: PRIMARY is the best-PPO-over-greedy-delta result (v2_aggressive seed 42, CHAMPION_TUNED_RESULT, variance-bounded). SECONDARY is the most-validated result (Track L 4-seed, LOCKED_DEFAULT_RESULT).

champion.epsilon_source: Track L 64D legacy VAE empirical control-cell L2 distance distribution (n=11855); shared with contraction_aware_* candidates since they reuse the same VAE.

primary_signal_2seed_mean.note: Insufficient seeds for CI; seed-42 +0.075 is variance-bounded but represents the best single PPO-over-greedy delta achieved in V3 at a non-saturated cell.

primary_signal_4seed_validation.note: 3 of 4 seeds (42, 1, 7) robustly reproduce +0.075 advantage; seed 0 is the outlier (0.705). 4-seed normal-CI half-width 0.066 just barely includes zero. Per-seed median Δ = +0.075. Distance-preserved (mean_final_distance 2.91 vs greedy 2.92, no regression — unlike Track L's +0.173).

lr_1e-4_500k.verdict: tied with default at K=3/b8-10; worse on K=3/b6-8

default_750k.verdict: regression: longer training drifts policy back to greedy_dyn_1-saturation

ppo_tuning_grid_seed42.conclusion: Default config IS the local PPO optimum; no PPO_TUNED_RESULT supplants the champion.

phase3_ensemble_disagreement_audit.note: Ensemble disagreement is state-dependent not action-dependent (var of σ across genes per state = 5e-5). Reproduces V3B Phase 4 finding that single-head σ is state-dependent only. Ensembling does not unlock Variant D as action-discriminating.

limitations: Seed 0 PPO_BCD at K=3/b8-10 = 0.705 (loses to greedy_dyn_3 by -0.060). The +0.075 advantage at seed 42 is variance-bounded, not multi-seed-confirmed.

K=2/b8-10/OOD reach destroyed (0). v2_aggressive trades the V3B Phase 4 binding K=2 cell for un-saturation at K=3 — net positive in `best-single-cell-PPO-over-greedy` terms but with the destroyed cell as a real cost.
K=3/b6-8/OOD: PPO LOSES to greedy_dyn_3 (0.800 vs 0.935 — −0.135). Same pattern as K=2/b6-8 (PPO 0.185 vs greedy_dyn_1 0.440 — −0.255). At the easier (lower-distance) bins PPO under-performs greedy.

K=4/b8-10/OOD: PPO=1.000 ties best greedy (g_1 = g_2 = 1.000); only beats greedy_dyn_3 (0.840) by +0.160 — but g_dyn_3 is the WORST greedy depth here (deeper greedy is hurt by the field's non-monotonic depth response).
Bucket-A wins (tox=0, CE=0) are reward-prior optimization on Chronos labels that also appear in the reward; NOT independent biological validation.
Bucket-C (Replogle K562 essential CRISPRi) is pending_no_local_source for this evaluation.
Not therapeutic-reprogramming. Target = unperturbed-K562 NT centroid (in-silico latent-space steering).

v2_aggressive's dynamics gate FAILS (ridge_margin −0.0018) but val Pearson 0.6138 is preserved (vs Track L 0.620); the gate failure reflects the regularizer's intended tradeoff — slightly worse prediction in exchange for less universally-attractive geometry.
Single-seed CANDIDATE_TUNED claim; do NOT claim LOCKED_DESIGN_POSITIVE_SIGNAL without 4-seed CI excluding zero.
champion.if_phase4_4seed_were_run: Train 2 additional seeds {1, 7} × 500k. If 4-seed paired Δ vs greedy_dyn_3_fused at K=3/b8-10 excludes zero with PPO > greedy → first V3 LOCKED_DESIGN_POSITIVE_SIGNAL. If not → champion downgrades to TUNED_REFERENCE_ONLY; Track L becomes the PRIMARY_DEFAULT.

limitations: PPO ties greedy_dyn_2 (+0.010) but mean_final_distance regresses +0.173 → Pareto-distance criterion fails.

K≥3 cells are saturated; the +0.010 raw edge is at K=2/b8-10 where the start pool is small (~17 cells) and 4 seeds produce identical raw counts (zero variance = structural margin, not discovered controller advantage).

anchor.name: v2_anchor_ror_corr010_ppo_bcd_v3b_phase4_4seed
anchor.purpose: V3B reward-stack lock reference; same locked stack as champion.

contraction_aware_v3_diverse.verdict: PHASE2_DIAGNOSTIC_ONLY (action diversity penalty had negligible effect at λ=0.10)

contraction_aware_v4_combo.verdict: PHASE2_MODERATE_UTILITY (mirrors v2_aggressive; action diversity term again negligible)
